templates.title: LAN: TCP grid meter + RTU PV
templates.description: Grid metering over Modbus TCP (bench PC or LAN meter); PV inverter on RS485. Single bus PCC.
templates.documentation:
Use when the grid block is reached over Ethernet (simulator or gateway).
Set tcpHost / unit ID to match the meter before site export.
Validation warns until firmware bundles match each slot device type.

templates.title: Fleet: dual genset sketch
templates.description: Same as built-in multi-generator topology, shipped as JSON so you can fork the file per customer without rebuilding the app.
templates.documentation:
Copy this JSON in public/site-templates/ to add fleet-specific defaults.
Adjust generator ratings, Modbus IDs, and minimum-load policy after load.
